Cache Firebase Storage Images with Cloudflare Workers — Completely Free Bandwidth Savings

If you're using Firebase Storage to host blog images like I was, you've probably noticed bandwidth costs creeping up — every article view pulls the images straight from Firebase Storage, and all of it lands on your Firebase bill. This post walks through how to use Cloudflare Workers plus a custom subdomain to cache those images. The whole setup is free and doesn't require a credit card.
Chrome Keeps Caching Your Changes? Three Ways to Clear It Fast

You updated the page but Chrome keeps showing the old version. This post walks through three ways to clear Chrome's cache — keyboard shortcut, devtools, and an extension — plus a tip for how developers can avoid the problem in the first place.
Clear LINE's Link Preview Cache With Page Poker

LINE is everywhere as a sharing channel, but once a link's been shared, LINE caches the preview aggressively — and there's no obvious way to bust the cache. Until you discover Page Poker. This post covers LINE's official Page Poker tool for clearing link preview cache, plus Facebook's Sharing Debugger as the equivalent for Facebook.
